title: Light Nutty Almond Crumble
description: A light and indulgent almond crumble featuring cornmeal, a hint of sweetness from dates, and broiled to perfection for an Italian-inspired dessert dish that's also jain-friendly.
instructions: Combine almond flour, cornstarch, oats, dates, salt, and cinnamon in a mixing bowl. Stir until well combined.
Add the melted coconut oil and maple syrup/honey, stirring continuously to create a smooth dough.
Press the dough mixture into an 8x8 inch baking dish lined with parchment paper.
Bake at broil setting for about 10 minutes or until golden brown. Watch carefully as it can burn quickly.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
